title: TrueCherry
body:
In 1.20 Mojang has added the Cherry Grove biome.
![Cherry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jWJw8B0w/images/a0d7f384fa7fbf8a658aa789ded6bf9a01e733dd.png)
However, apart from the atmosphere and the name of the wood, there's no food that relates to a real cherry tree.
This Mod therefore adds several new foods, the main one being cherries, which can be dropped from cherry leaves (a bit like apples with oak leaves).
![cherry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jWJw8B0w/images/0e1d21923d6c52e8449e75ddb226333126f02a62.png)
You can either eat the cherry, or make a cherry pie that's a little more saturated than the golden cherry, or a golden cherry that gives you an instant heal effect in a single shot (1 second), which comes in handy for the new Chambers Trials.
The mod also adds integration with Farmer villagers, who can sell different foods.
![villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jWJw8B0w/images/5e6ace4135c1ac9ff704a14e824968b3b17327ee.png)
